instruction: Create a 3-month exercise plan for a beginner aiming to lose 10 pounds, focusing on low-impact activities and weekly progress tracking. The plan must maintain a positive and encouraging tone throughout, with the first and last paragraphs emphasizing motivation and achievable goals. Provide specific details regarding the types of exercises, their duration, and the purpose of each activity. Incorporate the phrase "sustainable lifestyle changes" at least once in the response. Use the keyword "progressive" to convey the definition "happening or developing gradually or in stages." Ensure the response includes four uppercase words and is structured into three distinct paragraphs. The response must consist of exactly five paragraphs.
response:
Start your journey with the belief that every small step counts toward a brighter future, and remember that losing ten pounds is an absolutely achievable goal when you approach it with patience and joy. You are not just building a routine; you are cultivating a foundation for sustainable lifestyle changes that will serve you for years to come.

Weeks one through three will introduce you to a progressive schedule designed to build strength without putting stress on your joints, featuring activities like gentle walking for twenty minutes, seated marching for ten minutes, and simple stretching routines for five minutes each day. These low-impact exercises are chosen specifically to help your body adapt gradually, ensuring that you feel energized rather than exhausted as you move forward with confidence.

TRACK YOUR progress by logging your weight, energy levels, and how you feel after each workout in a dedicated journal, so you can celebrate every tiny victory along the way. By staying consistent and listening to your body, you will naturally discover that the most effective path to weight loss is one that feels good and keeps you motivated to keep going.

As you move into the final weeks, you will notice your body becoming stronger and more resilient, allowing you to extend your walking sessions and add a few more minutes to your stretching practice. This steady, step-by-step approach ensures that your gains are real and lasting, proving that small, consistent efforts lead to big, wonderful results over time.

FINISH this three-month challenge with a sense of pride and accomplishment, knowing that you have successfully transformed your habits and improved your overall well-being. Your dedication today lays the groundwork for a healthier tomorrow, and you have proven that you are capable of achieving anything you set your mind to.

Conflicts between Length Constraints.new_constraint: The response must consist of exactly five paragraphs.
Conflicts between Length Constraints.org_constraint: The response must be structured into three distinct paragraphs.
